description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on push to the main branch and on create events. Use a matrix strategy to build wheels on ubuntu-20.04, windows-2022, and macos-10.15. For each job, check out the code, set up Python 3.9 with pip caching, install dependencies, prepare the environment, build wheels using cibuildwheel, and upload the resulting wheels as an artifact.
